title: MEDICAL DETOX AND CLINICALLY MANAGED DETOX - 211info
text: RECOVERY VILLAGE CENTER MEDICAL DETOX MEDICAL DETOX AND CLINICALLY MANAGED DETOX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical detox for adults who need assistance with detoxification from one or more substances prior to entering a residential program. This is a voluntary program and the focus is management of symptoms during detoxification. The program has licensed professional oversight, and the individual meets daily with a Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner who assists with Medication Assisted Treatment. 3680 Midway Street Baker City, OR 978141466 Eligibility: Single-parent households with children ages 0-6 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 523-4049 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-4049 Intake (541) 406-4363 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call intake number or email for evaluation or referral FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. No one will be denied access to outpatient mental health or addictions services due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Harney, Malheur, Union, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: I-84 East exit #304 Services: Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
